summary: Russian operators of the "Rubicon" Center destroyed 234 targets on April 21, 2026, including Ukrainian personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, motor vehicles, armored vehicles, and communication elements across multiple directions including Donbas, Krasny Liman, Sumy, and Belgorod. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to destroy a Russian TOS-1A MLRS after it was initially damaged by a Bulava loitering munition, and also struck two Russian soldiers on motorcycles during an assault. In Kostiantynivka, Ukrainian soldiers of the 36th Marine Brigade survived an FPV drone attack, reportedly detecting the threat via a drone detector at 0:11 in the footage.
